add-hidden-sessionid-field-with-guid-to-.title: Add Hidden SessionId Field with GUID to PDFs in Batch
add-hidden-sessionid-field-with-guid-to-.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDF files, add a hidden text field named "SessionId" on the first page, fill it with a generated GUID, and save the modified documents using Aspose.Pdf.

add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF with Appearance
add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Shows how to add a signature field named "DigitalSignature" to a PDF, assign a visual appearance image, and sign the field using a PKCS#1 certificate with Aspose.Pdf.

set-field-appearance-format-price.title: Set Field Appearance and Format Value for PDF Form Field
set-field-appearance-format-price.description: Demonstrates how to change a form field's appearance using SetFieldAppearance and then fill the field with a value formatted to two decimal places.

export-checkbox-fields-to-fdf.title: Export Checkbox Fields to FDF File
export-checkbox-fields-to-fdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, remove all non‑checkbox form fields, and export the remaining checkbox definitions to an FDF file using Aspose.Pdf facades.
